title: chamaecrista gracilis
intro: Chamaecrista gracilis, also known as the slender sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chamaecrista gracilis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Chamaecrista gracilis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical cream, and is often used in traditional African medicine to treat various ailments.
